description: Non-custodial BVCC Agent Wallet on-chain for AI agents: balances, transfers, approvals, swaps.
name: com.blockventurechaincapital/bvcc-agent-wallet

environmentVariables.description: Agent EOA private key (0x + 64 hex). Used locally to sign only; never transmitted.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: The BVCC Agent Wallet address this agent operates (0x...).
environmentVariables.name: WALLET_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: Default chain id: 42161 Arbitrum, 56 BNB Chain, 1 Ethereum, 8453 Base, 421614 Arbitrum Sepolia. Every tool also accepts an optional per-call network.
environmentVariables.name: CHAIN_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional custom RPC for the default chain (comma-separated list allowed for failover). Public default used otherwise. Per-chain override via RPC_URL_<chainId>.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose only read/simulate tools (no fund-moving writes).
environmentVariables.name: BVCC_MCP_READONLY
